task_completion.description: Open the draft transit plan document in a word processor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file 'draft_transit_plan.odt' is open in a word processing application (like Calligra Words), showing the title and initial text.

task_completion.description: Apply 'Heading 1' style to the main section titles.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Executive Summary', 'Existing Conditions', and 'Implementation Timeline' appear visibly larger and bolder than body text, and the style selector indicates 'Heading 1' when the cursor is on them.

task_completion.description: Apply 'Heading 2' style to the subsection titles.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Proposed Bicycle Facilities' and 'Project Funding Summary' are styled distinctly as subheadings (smaller than Heading 1 but larger/bolder than normal text), with the style selector indicating 'Heading 2'.

task_completion.description: Convert the manually hyphenated list of bicycle facilities into a semantic bulleted list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The list items (Protected Bike Lanes, Buffered Bike Lanes, Bicycle Boulevards, Shared Use Paths) are formatted with standard bullet points and proper indentation, rather than starting with manual hyphens ('-').

task_completion.description: Transform the tab-separated funding data into a 3-column, 4-row semantic table.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A visible table structure (gridlines or distinct cell boundaries) containing 3 columns and 4 rows is present, populated with the funding data (e.g., Downtown Network, $4.2M, CMAQ).

task_completion.description: Insert a Table of Contents at the beginning of the document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A generated Table of Contents block is visible at the top of the document, positioned between the main title and the 'Executive Summary' section, listing the H1 and H2 headings.

integrity.description: The agent used the word processor GUI to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Calligra Words interface (menus, toolbars, style dropdowns) rather than a terminal text editor or python script.

integrity.description: The agent used actual table and list features rather than manually spacing text.
integrity.visual_evidence: The table has actual structural gridlines/cells, and the list uses the word processor's native bullet feature (visible in the toolbar state), not manually typed characters.

integrity.description: The agent saved the changes to the file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent clicks the 'Save' icon or uses the File > Save menu, and there is no 'unsaved changes' asterisk or indicator in the window title bar at the end of the trajectory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The document is opened in Calligra Words. Expected H1 sections: 'Executive Summary', 'Existing Conditions', 'Implementation Timeline'. Expected H2 sections: 'Proposed Bicycle Facilities', 'Project Funding Summary'. The list to be converted contains: 'Protected Bike Lanes', 'Buffered Bike Lanes', 'Bicycle Boulevards', 'Shared Use Paths'. The table data includes keywords like 'Downtown Network', '$4.2M', 'CMAQ', 'Riverfront Path', '$8.5M', and 'University Connector'.
